content:
Hi guys, I am trying to do ldd3 exercises in rust, but I cannot find the chardev module in rust-next, however, I see it was there in the old rust branch.
Why was it removed, what mod should I use instead in rust-next?
It's not that it was removed. It was just never added there.
We don't have anything to make character devices in upstream Linux yet.
so It will be added to rust-next when there is driver that needs it?
Pretty much yes. We can't add something that no driver needs.
